mapper.sql: ol.id, ol.username, ol.action, ol.resource, ol.resource_id, ol.detail, ol.ip_address, ol.status, ol.operated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO operation_logs (username, action, resource, resource_id, detail, ip_address, status, operated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{action}, #{resource}, #{resourceId}, #{detail}, #{ipAddress}, #{status}, #{operatedAt})
